title: [WithU] NiziU 討論區 (3) 12月2日 出道！Miihi will be okay！

replies.msg:
NiziU（日語：ニジュー；韓語：니쥬），為日本索尼音樂娛樂和韓國JYP娛樂聯手打造的日本九人女子團體，成員通過JYP自製生存實境節目《Nizi Project》篩選而出。最終由九名成員山口真子（Mako）、大江梨久（Riku）、中林里茉（Rima）、花橋梨緒（Rio）、勝村摩耶（Maya）、鈴野未光（Miihi）、小合麻由佳（Mayuka）、新井彩花（Ayaka）和牧野仁菜（Nina）組成，2020年12月2日透過單曲《Step and a step》在日本正式出道。

團名「NiziU」由JYP娛樂公司創辦者朴軫永取名，有「Need you」的意思，「Nizi」代表由Nizi Project誕生的團體，「U」代表成員彼此和支持他們的粉絲，寓意為「人們永遠不可能靠自己一個人獲得成功，要記得你們需要彼此、需要粉絲。」

問候語為「We NiziU！我們是NiziU。」（日語：We NiziU！私たちNiziUです。/ 英語：We NiziU! We are NiziU.）

Q. In which moment do you feel yourself the most?
Nina: My favourite moment is when I’m drawing. When I’m drawing, I can just relax without thinking about anything, so it’s my favourite moment.
Ayaka: When I’m on a video call with my mom. I feel myself so much when I’m just talking about random topic and laughing about it, that moment is my favourite.
Mayuka: When I’m playing with my cat. I have 2 cats at home, I think I can be myself the most when I’m playing with them.
Maya: That would be when I’m cooking. It’s so much fun when I’m cooking, and I love seeing my members eating so deliciously when I cook for them.
Riku: When I’m eating something. When I’m eating, I’m really filled with happiness, I can forget about my concerns, I can just focus on eating, so I think it’s the moment I can be who I am
Rio: When I’m dancing. Not only considering I’ve been doing it since I was little, but also considering all the steps I’ve worked to improve my skill, I feel that moment makes me so myself.
Rima: I like same old work like puzzles, I can be so concentrated that I don’t notice even others call my name. I think that moment is so me.
Mako: The moment when I’m writing in my diary. Everyday, I write in my diary in end of the day, that moment if my favourite.
